project:
<fileHeader companyName="" productName="CODESYS" productVersion="CODESYS V3.5 SP21" creationDateTime="" />
  <contentHeader name="FB_StateMachine" modificationDateTime="">
    
      
      
      
    
  
  
    
    
      
        
        
          
            
            Rising edge starts cycle
          
          
            
            
            Operation timeout
          
        
        
          
            
            Cycle complete
          
          
            
            Cycle in progress
          
          
            
            Cycle errored
          
          
            
            Error ID
          
        
        
          
            
            
            State machine pointer
          
          
            
            Timeout watchdog
          
        
      
        
          
            CASE nState OF
    0: (* IDLE *)
        IF bExecute THEN
            nState := 10;
        END_IF
    10: (* WORKING *)
        bBusy := TRUE;
        fbTimer(IN := TRUE, PT := tTimeout);
        IF fbTimer.Q THEN
            nState := 99;
            nErrId := 100;
        END_IF
    90: (* DONE *)
        bDone := TRUE;
        bBusy := FALSE;
    99: (* ERROR *)
        bErr := TRUE;
        bBusy := FALSE;
END_CASE
